EmailTemplate.description: Recent payment was unsuccessful and we were unable to contact the customer, so this is notification of the policy cancellation.
EmailTemplate.name: 30 Day Cancellation Notice
EmailTemplate.subject: Outstanding Payment Required
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for contacting Kingsbridge.
Following your recent Kingsbridge policy purchase and payment of £XXX, we have received notification from your bank that the payment has been unsuccessful.
Unfortunately, if we are unable to speak with you and collect payment before XXXX, in accordance with the terms and conditions, your policy will be cancelled from inception. This means the policy will be null and void and you will have no rights to any cover under this policy at any time.
We have already tried to call you to discuss this and will again in the next few working days to re-attempt the payment.
Alternatively, please contact us at your earliest convenience on 01242 808740 to discuss this further.
Kind regards,
{!User.FirstName} Customer Accounts Team
E: customersupport@kingsbridge.co.uk T: 01242 808 740
